chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1761 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 21.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. Mr.Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for respondents No.7 to 9. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Muhammad Aslam of P.S Kunri District Umerkot and ASI Ghulam Murtaza o/b of SHO P.S Kot Ghulam Muhammad. = Today, the official respondents have filed their statements and according to which they have denied the allegations of causing harassment to the petitioner nor at present there is any FIR lodged against the petitioner. However, today Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.7 to 9, who are also present in Court and state that in past there was a business relationship between the petitioner and private respondents and three different cheques given by the petitioner on presentment were dishonoured. Be that as it may, the private respondents, if have any genuine grievance against the petitioner, are at liberty to seek their remedy through due process of law but not by taking law in their hands by causing harassment to the petitioner. With these observations, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
